title: kb.tier.changed v1
description: Emitted once per entry transition by `kb tier-promote` (live runs only — never on --dry-run). Real tier transitions (inbox->graded, graded->promoted, promoted->graded) and dedup-collision skips both ride this channel, discriminated by `transition`. A frequent dedup_skipped stream signals duplicate content repeatedly re-promoted; a dedup_skipped event with no matching on-disk duplicate flags the ephemeral dedup index diverging from indexed/. Source: kb/src/commands/tier.rs (run_promote).

project.description: Project the vault entry belongs to.

confidence.description: Grading confidence driving the transition decision.

transition.description: graded: inbox->graded (field rewrite, no move). promoted: graded->promoted (move inbox->indexed + rewrite + history). demoted: promoted->graded (move indexed->inbox + rewrite + history). dedup_skipped: would-have-promoted but a same content_hash entry already exists at the destination — left in place.

dedup_target.description: Present only when transition=dedup_skipped: path of the existing entry that blocked the move.
